text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Another long-fought and fearsome trial<n>
overcome, I entered act two of my<n>Prelude to
Glory...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh my, if it isn't Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Impeccable timing. I was just giving alive rendition of The Legend of T.M.Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Worry not, I still have three hundred<n>pages to go!
There's still plenty of<n>scenes for you to enjoy!
